name: Theo Von
blurb: He first appeared on reality television in the early 2000s before turning to stand-up and podcasting.
bio: Theo Von is an American stand-up comedian and podcaster from Louisiana known for surreal, free-associative storytelling rooted in his Southern small-town upbringing. He first appeared on reality television in the early 2000s before turning to stand-up and podcasting. He hosts the widely listened-to podcast This Past Weekend and has released the Netflix specials No Offense and Regular People.

timeline.ev: Wins Fan Favorite on the Last Comic Standing online competition
Releases his first Netflix special, No Offense
Launches the This Past Weekend podcast
Releases the Netflix special Regular People
This Past Weekend ranks among the most-listened podcasts on Spotify

accolades: Two Netflix stand-up specials, No Offense and Regular People
Host of one of the most popular podcasts on Spotify
Fan Favorite, Last Comic Standing online competition
